title: Pugmarks India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pugmarks India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India:
Pugmarks India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India!
